topic_title: Open structured-metadata dataset of LLM-eval papers

top_findings.name: trojblue/danbooru2025-metadata
top_findings.why_overlaps: HuggingFace dataset/space 'trojblue/danbooru2025-metadata' (1,298 downloads) matched 'metadata' — provides similar data/evaluation assets.
top_findings.how_we_differ: Our proposed work focuses specifically on 'Open structured-metadata dataset of LLM-eval papers'. Articulate a concrete contribution gap versus this existing work before promoting to GO (see §6 verification log).
